pi_items.source: ONET SOC 13-2051.00 maps to 'Financial and Investment Analysts' per onetonline.org. Task description says 'financial analyst at an investment bank', consistent with this classification.
Task explicitly describes building a DCF valuation model, which is a core investment banking / equity research activity.
ONET Online confirms SOC 13-2051.00 = 'Financial and Investment Analysts'. This is the correct code for professionals who perform financial modeling and valuation.

pi_items.metadata_value: Discounted Cash Flow with CAPM-derived WACC and Gordon Growth Terminal Value
pi_items.verified_value: Discounted Cash Flow with CAPM-derived WACC and Gordon Growth Terminal Value
pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs: CAPM for cost of equity (Ke = Rf + Beta * ERP), weighted average cost of capital, Gordon Growth Model for terminal value. Verified in DCF_Valuation sheet template labels: 'Cost of Equity (Ke)', 'WACC', 'Terminal Value'.

pi_items.metadata_value: Realistic SaaS company financials; Treasury 10Y yield 4.25% (Jan 2024); Damodaran ERP 5.5%; typical mid-cap tech beta 1.15
pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic SaaS financials (no real company). Rf=4.25% is approximate for Jan 2024 Treasury 10Y (actual range ~4.14-4.20% per FRED DGS10). ERP=5.5% is a common textbook value but Damodaran's Jan 2024 implied ERP was ~4.6%. Beta=1.15 is reasonable for mid-cap tech.
pi_items.source: Data is synthetic — not traceable to any public company SEC filing. Treasury yield verified via FRED; Damodaran ERP checked against pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/. Historical financials (GP margins ~64%, EBIT margins ~18%, revenue growth 12-20%) are realistic for a mature SaaS company but not from a specific real company.
Confirmed via live environment: file exists at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ExcelTasks\company_valuation.xlsx (8734 bytes, 4 sheets). SCP'd from VM and verified with openpyxl.
Live environment test confirmed file exists at this exact path. setup_task.ps1 copies from C:\workspace\data\ to this location.
Independently computed: Historical_Financials!F2 (2180.0) * (1 + Assumptions!B2 (0.12)) = 2180 * 1.12 = 2441.6 exactly. Verified by reading xlsx cells via openpyxl from VM SCP copy.
Independently computed: 2180 * 1.12 * 1.10 * 1.08 * 1.07 * 1.06 = 3289.884111. Metadata rounds to 3289.88, actual is 3289.8841. Match within 0.0001%.

Independently computed: Revenue_2024 * (1 - 0.36 - 0.26 - 0.15 - 0.05) = 2441.6 * 0.18 = 439.488. EBIT margin = 18% (= 1 - COGS% - SGA% - R&D% - D&A%). Metadata rounds to 439.49, actual is 439.488. Match within 0.0005%.
Independently computed: EBIT_2024 * (1 - tax_rate) = 439.488 * 0.78 = 342.80064. Match within 0.0002%.
Independently computed by chaining all 5 projection years. FCF_2028 = NOPAT_2028 (461.8997) + D&A_2028 (164.4942) - CapEx_2028 (230.2919) - dNWC_2028 (15.8287) = 380.2734. Match within 0.0009%.
Independently computed: Ke = Rf + Beta * ERP = 0.0425 + 1.15 * 0.055 = 0.0425 + 0.06325 = 0.10575 = 10.575%. Exact match.
Independently computed: TV = FCF_2028 * (1+g) / (WACC - g) = 380.2734 * 1.03 / (0.090525 - 0.03) = 391.6816 / 0.060525 = 6471.40. Metadata rounds to 6471, actual is 6471.40. Match within 0.006%.
Independently computed: EV = Sum_PV_FCF (1257.41) + PV_TV (4195.85) = 5453.26. Metadata rounds to 5454, actual is 5453.26. Match within 0.014%.
Independently computed: Equity = EV - Debt + Cash = 5453.26 - 355 + 580 = 5678.26. Metadata rounds to 5679, actual is 5678.26. Match within 0.013%.
Independently computed: Price = Equity / Shares = 5678.26 / 245 = 23.1766, rounds to 23.18. Exact match to 2 decimal places.

Verified from task description and sheet templates: (1) cross_sheet_references: Projected sheet references Historical (base revenue) and Assumptions (rates); DCF references Projected, Assumptions, and Historical. (2) CAPM_formula: Ke = Rf + Beta*ERP per DCF_Valuation row 12. (3) Gordon_Growth_Model: TV formula per row 20. (4) multi_sheet_model: 4 sheets with cross-references. (5) cascading_formulas: Revenue->COGS->GP->EBIT->NOPAT->FCF->EV->Price = 7-level cascade.

privileged_info_summary: This task requires building a DCF valuation model in company_valuation.xlsx (4 sheets). The Projected_Financials sheet (B2:F10) and DCF_Valuation sheet (multiple sections) must be filled with formulas. Key inputs from the Assumptions sheet: revenue growth rates 12%/10%/8%/7%/6% for 2024E-2028E; COGS=36%, SGA=26%, R&D=15%, D&A=5% of revenue; CapEx=7%, NWC=8.5% of revenue change; Tax=22%. WACC inputs: Rf=4.25%, ERP=5.50%, Beta=1.15, Kd=5.75%, D/V=25%, terminal growth=3.0%. Historical base: Revenue 2023=$2,180M (cell F2), Total Debt=$355M (F15), Cash=$580M (F16), Shares=245M (F17). Expected ground truth outputs: Revenue 2024E=$2,441.6M, Revenue 2028E=$3,289.88M. EBIT 2024E=$439.49M (18% margin = 1-36%-26%-15%-5%). NOPAT 2024E=$342.80M. FCF 2024E=$271.73M (NOPAT $342.80 + D&A $122.08 - CapEx $170.91 - dNWC $22.24). FCF 2028E=$380.27M. Ke=10.575% (=4.25%+1.15*5.50%). WACC=9.0525% (=75%*10.575%+25%*5.75%*78%). Terminal Value=$6,471M (=FCF2028*1.03/(9.0525%-3%)). Sum PV FCFs=$1,257M. PV of TV=$4,196M. Enterprise Value=$5,453M. Equity Value=$5,678M (=EV-355+580). Implied Share Price=$23.18 (=5678/245). All values are deterministic from the xlsx inputs. Data is synthetic. The agent must use cell references (not hardcoded values) and save the workbook.
